rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area; outside center avg $1,531; center $2,057; CHF is strong

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Zurich utilities avg $185/mo + CHF internet ~$60

groceries.note: home cooking; Migros/Coop; expensive by European standards; Aldi cheaper option

diningOut.note: cheap restaurant ~$22/meal; mid-range dinner for two ~$100; very expensive eating out

transit.note: ZVV monthly pass CHF ~$119; excellent tram/bus/train network

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; TomoDomo coliving option from CHF ~€1,577; budget hot desk ~CHF 250

simData.note: SIM-only plan (Salt/Yallo) unlimited data; Switzerland mobile costs elevated

misc.note: gym (~$80), toiletries, entertainment, health insurance buffer (mandatory in CH)

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Zurich long-term furnished lets are stable year-round.

evidence.claim: Zurich solo monthly cost with rent
evidence.quote: A single person costs $4,756 per month
A 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre averages $2,057/month; Moving outside the centre saves approximately $526/month, bringing rent to $1,531
monthly public transport in Zurich costs $119, and utilities average $185/month
Budget nomads can live in Zurich for $2,958/month by renting outside the centre ($1,531), eating at cheap restaurants ($22/meal), using public transport ($119/month)
